content.full_text:
May 9, 2001

M. Daws
Post Office Box 935
Lake Elsinore, CA 92531

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-085

Dear M. Daws:

We have received your letter notifying us that you have withdrawn your request for advice. We regret that you took offense to our April 10, 2001, letter to you; that correspondence was a standard letter sent out as a practice to acknowledge receipt of a request for advice or information from the Fair Political Practices Commission.

I have enclosed several documents that I hope will answer general questions you may have regarding the Political Reform Act’s campaign reporting rules. Please do not hesitate to contact our office at our toll-free help line at (866) 275-3772 if you have any additional questions.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Kelly L. Winsor,
Legal Analyst
